negative_samples: Everything is AI art, anything that isn't is an asset flip. It lacks any soul or interest. Could've just been a menu game.

I can't quite place it but there's something about this game that feels very stiff and lifeless to me. Pizza Tycoon from the 90's was more enjoyable. I'd like to enjoy this game simply because I enjoy coffee, so it would be great if I could play a coffee shop

crashes a lot, the art is clearly ai. I tried ignoring it but I suspect a lot of the writing is ai generated too. The game itself is very addicting for me and I do enjoy it, but I can't in good conscience recommend ai slop

Just doesn't run well. I know it's not my computer, I can run BG3 for hours with no issues but this game runs like a slideshow for me. It seems fun but as is it's not playable for me, even after fiddling with the settings for 20 minutes or so.
positive_samples: I got this while it was on sale and I'm glad i did. This has been one of the best cafe tycoons I've played. I love the gameplay the the immersiveness of the coffee making, you can really make it your own. I would recommend if you're thinking of buying it.
Besides the missing censor and the slight glitch where some customers get stuck in the corner, I really enjoyed the game! I just finished it.

Fun and charming but not recommended for mouse/keyboard - it can be challenging to get the diagonals consistently and navigate the space since space management is a big part of the game. Also a bit tedious that a single lost customer loses you the entire run,

Great start for a game, but lacks challenge, and very much has given me a feeling of "That's it?"  I have seen the entire game after 2 hours. There is nothing new beyond that point,  just the same thing over and over.   The difficulty simply doesn't ramp here
positive_samples: Coffee Caravan is a nice cozy game  where you're playing as a barista and prepare some various delicious drinks of coffees and teas. Each end of day you can upgrade your equipments. The designs are really nice and the soundtrack is jazzy and chill. It's the pe

If you want a cozy, cafe version of PlateUp! then this is for you.  Summary of game:   Basically, you would make the recipes using computer controls (the only thing that uses the mouse is the shop and other selections.) Like I said, it's kind of like PlateUp!
Simple but fun game. I only wish it lasted a little longer, and got more challenging.

Super fun and very cozy! It's just the right amount of challenging to stay interesting on each run but very easy to pick up the controls and make the different drinks. Highly recommend this game for anyone looking for a fun, cozy game!
